fields.name: Overdue Sales Documents
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of invoices where the customer is late with payment.

fields.name: Purchase Documents Due Today
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of purchase invoices that are due for payment today.

fields.name: POs Pending Approval
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of purchase orders that are pending approval.

fields.name: SOs Pending Approval
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of sales orders that are pending approval.

fields.name: Approved Sales Orders
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of approved sales orders.

fields.name: Approved Purchase Orders
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of approved purchase orders.

fields.name: Vendors - Payment on Hold
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of vendor to whom your payment is on hold.

fields.name: Purchase Return Orders
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of purchase return orders that are displayed in the Finance Cue on the Role Center. The documents are filtered by today's date.

fields.name: Sales Return Orders - All
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of sales return orders that are displayed in the Finance Cue on the Role Center. The documents are filtered by today's date.

fields.name: Customers - Blocked
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of customer that are blocked from further sales.

fields.name: Overdue Purchase Documents
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of purchase invoices where your payment is late.

fields.name: Purchase Discounts Next Week
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of purchase discounts that are available next week, for example, because the discount expires after next week.

fields.name: Purch. Invoices Due Next Week
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of payments to vendors that are due next week.

fields.name: New Incoming Documents
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of new incoming documents in the company. The documents are filtered by today's date.

fields.name: Approved Incoming Documents
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of approved incoming documents in the company. The documents are filtered by today's date.

fields.name: OCR Completed
fields.tooltip: Specifies that incoming document records that have been created by the OCR service.

fields.name: Non-Applied Payments
fields.tooltip: Specifies a window to reconcile unpaid documents automatically with their related bank transactions by importing a bank statement feed or file. In the payment reconciliation journal, incoming or outgoing payments on your bank are automatically, or semi-automatically, applied to their related open customer or vendor ledger entries. Any open bank account ledger entries related to the applied customer or vendor ledger entries will be closed when you choose the Post Payments and Reconcile Bank Account action. This means that the bank account is automatically reconciled for payments that you post with the journal.

fields.name: Cash Accounts Balance
fields.tooltip: Specifies the sum of the accounts that have the cash account category.

fields.name: Outstanding Vendor Invoices
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of invoices from your vendors that have not been paid yet.

fields.name: Total Overdue (LCY)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total overdue amount.

fields.name: Total Outstanding (LCY)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total outstanding amount.

fields.name: Non Issued Reminders
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of reminders that have been created but have not been issued yet.

fields.name: Active Reminders
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of reminders that are issued and still not paid.

fields.name: Reminders not Send
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of reminders that have not been sent yet for the current level.

fields.name: Active Reminder Automation
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of automations configured for reminders.

fields.name: Reminder Automation Failures
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of failures that occured for the existing reminder automations.
